description: Turkish Airlines is an airline carrier. Its website includes a developer portal for partners to access airline-related APIs such as flight availability, timetables, airport data, and mileage calculations.
summary: turkishairlines.com exposes a developer portal for Turkish Airlines HTTP APIs; docs are sign-in gated, and the visible onboarding says access uses OAuth 2.0 client-credentials with per-application client ID/client secret plus a required `transactionId` header.
